name: OpenWrt 25.12 - Minimal with zh-cn (iptables-legacy)
description: Minimal OpenWrt 25.12 router rootfs built for Android kernels: nftables/fw4 stripped out in favor of iptables-legacy + fw3, with full firewall (NAT, zones, masquerade) working. Tuned for VirtualAP's managed-hotspot (container) mode.
author: xys20071111

name: ImmortalWrt 25.12 - Minimal with zh-cn (iptables-legacy)
description: Minimal ImmortalWrt 25.12 router rootfs built for Android kernels: nftables/fw4 stripped out in favor of iptables-legacy + fw3, with full firewall (NAT, zones, masquerade) working. Tuned for VirtualAP's managed-hotspot (container) mode.
author: xys20071111
